name: IdsEdwFcltyTypProvCatXrefDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH SourceData AS ( SELECT FCLTY_TYP_PROV.FCLTY_TYP_PROV_CAT_XREF_SK, FCLTY_TYP_PROV.FCLTY_TYP_CD, FCLTY_TYP_PROV.PROV_CAT_CD, FCLTY_TYP_PROV.FCLTY_TYP_CD_SK, FCLTY_TYP_PROV.PROV_CAT_SK, FCLTY_TYP_PROV.WEB_SRCH_IN, FCLTY_TYP_PROV.USER_ID, FCLTY_TYP_PROV.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, PROV_CAT.PROV_CAT_NM, FCLTY_TYP_CD.FCLTY_TYP_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.FCLTY_TYP_PROV_CAT_XREF FCLTY_TYP_PROV JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PROV_CAT PROV_CAT ON FCLTY_TYP_PROV.PROV_CAT_SK = PROV_CAT.PROV_CAT_SK JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.FCLTY_TYP_CD FCLTY_TYP_CD ON FCLTY_TYP_PROV.FCLTY_TYP_CD_SK = FCLTY_TYP_CD.FCLTY_TYP_CD_SK WHERE FCLTY_TYP_PROV.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}) SELECT SourceData.FCLTY_TYP_PROV_CAT_XREF_SK AS FCLTY_TYP_PROV_CAT_XREF_SK, SourceData.FCLTY_TYP_CD AS FCLTY_TYP_CD, SourceData.PROV_CAT_CD AS PROV_CAT_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, SourceData.FCLTY_TYP_CD_SK AS FCLTY_TYP_SK, SourceData.PROV_CAT_SK AS PROV_CAT_SK, SourceData.FCLTY_TYP_NM AS FCLTY_TYP_NM, SourceData.PROV_CAT_NM AS PROV_CAT_NM, SourceData.WEB_SRCH_IN AS WEB_SRCH_IN, SourceData.USER_ID AS USER_ID, SourceData.LAST_UPDT_DT_SK AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK
